reason: Verify gateway OpenAPI operations, RESTful resource paths, response envelopes, and owner-service markers.
Verify data model and implementation plan align with document-owned PostgreSQL and MinIO responsibilities.
Verify public and service errors follow stable error categories and avoid leaking internals.
Verify logs and operation audit fields avoid secrets, prompts, MinIO keys, and full document content.
Verify service-local quality, testing, and build expectations.
Verify public API fields, database fields, workflow events, and MCP outputs stay consistent across layers.
